name: Metronidazole
executiveSummary: Nitroimidazole antibiotic and antiparasitic agent. Active against anaerobes and protozoa.
indications:
## Main indications

Nitroimidazole antibiotic and antiparasitic agent. Active against anaerobes and protozoa.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.presentation: 500 mg in 100 mL bag (Metronidazol Norgreen, Rivero, Ugar).
adulto.reconstitution: No prior reconstitution required. Conc.: 5 mg/mL.
adulto.administration: Direct IV: No. Intermittent IV: Yes. Infuse over 60 min.

pediatrico.dose: Anaerobic infections (PO; IV): 30 mg/kg/day every 8 h, maximum PO: 2 g; IV: 4 g. Amebiasis: 35 mg/kg/day every 8 h for 10 days.
pediatrico.notes: Avoid alcoholic beverages during treatment and for 48 h afterward. Use caution with warfarin.

stability:
## Reconstituted (in vial)

- Not applicable.

## Diluted solution (for administration)

- Not specified.

## Pediatric guide

- Discard remainder once opened.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Nausea, vomiting, metallic taste, peripheral neuropathy with prolonged courses, hypersensitivity reactions.
